sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 64:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 64:1
items.html: The matter of the ascent to Malchut of the Rosh means equivalence with Malchut of the Rosh. This is only after the screen had been completely refined from all its coarseness. Hence, in all these exits and entries that were in the second expansion, before the light expanded to Malchut, the screen was still not refined completely. This is because until it expanded to Hod, it still had coarseness of phase one, and when it expanded to Yesod it still had root coarseness, which draws the level of Malchut. Therefore, it is still in disparity of form from Malchut of the Rosh. However, after it expanded to the vessel Malchut, it was refined completely, like the phase of Malchut of the Rosh. At that time, it rose to Malchut of the Rosh and the couplings for the Partzuf below it, called SAG, were made there, since the ascents of all the lights to the Rosh always elicit another Partzuf, which is a son of the previous Partzuf.
